verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Only A Look At Jesus O Soul Bowed Down With Care He Has Promised To Defend You He Will All Your Burdens Share

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Only A Look! Only A Look! Can Turn You Away From Sin Oh, A Look, Will You Bring You Salvation Eternal Life To Win.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Only A Look At Jesus He’ll Prove A Constant Friend He Will Bring You Peace And Comfort And Go With You To The End

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Only A Look! Only A Look! Can Turn You Away From Sin Oh, A Look, Will You Give You Salvation Eternal Life To Win.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Only A Look! Only A Look! Can Turn You Away From Sin Oh, A Look, Will You Give You Salvation Eternal Life To Win. Eternal Life To Win.
